Index.title: Industrial Infrastructure Execution
Index.description: Technical execution for industrial and institutional projects.

Footer.description: Execution company specialized in the fabrication, installation, and construction of industrial and institutional infrastructure.

Hero.headline: Execution of industrial and institutional infrastructure based on client engineering.
Hero.subheadline: We execute high-complexity structural infrastructure and civil projects strictly according to the architecture and engineering specifications provided by the client.
Hero.panelTitle: Operations aligned with client engineering specifications
Hero.panelBullet1: Structural fabrication and installation for industrial and institutional environments
Hero.panelBullet2: Field quality control, safety compliance, and operational discipline
Hero.panelBullet3: Coordinated delivery with client engineering and supervision teams

Overview.title: Execution based on client engineering
Overview.description1: Construcción y Mantenimientos FITA is an execution company specialized in the fabrication, installation, and construction of industrial and institutional infrastructure.
Overview.description2: Engineering and architectural design are provided by the client or their engineering firm. FITA executes projects strictly according to those specifications.

Institutional.standardsDesc: Industrial infrastructure execution demands operational discipline, technical control, and strict compliance with specifications. FITA executes each project following the technical standards defined by the client, ensuring that fabrication, installation, and verification processes align with established engineering documents.
Institutional.sectorsDesc: FITA executes projects across various industrial and institutional environments, adapting our field teams and operational processes to the specific technical standards of each sector.
Institutional.collabDesc: In industrial infrastructure projects, engineering is the starting point. FITA collaborates directly with the client's engineering teams or external engineering firms, executing infrastructure according to the blueprints, technical specifications, and operational standards defined for the project.

Model.title: Operational Team Model
Model.subtitle: Each project requires different technical capabilities.
Model.description1: For this reason, FITA structures its field teams based on the specific requirements of each project, integrating qualified personnel experienced in the disciplines required by the scope of work.
Model.description2: This operational model allows flexible execution capacity while ensuring that each project is executed by specialists aligned with the client's technical standards. Each project defines the team that executes it.

Capabilities.title: Global Execution Capabilities
Capabilities.subtitle: Technical delivery for industrial, energy, and institutional infrastructure.

items.title: Structural fabrication
items.description: Fabrication of structural steel components according to engineering drawings.

items.title: Structural installation
items.description: Assembly and installation of structural steel infrastructure.

items.title: Surface preparation and protective coating systems
items.description: Industrial surface preparation and application of technical protective coatings.

items.title: Structural maintenance and reinforcement
items.description: Corrective structural maintenance and reinforcement of existing infrastructure.

items.title: Electrical infrastructure installation (construction phase)
items.description: Installation of conduit, electrical channeling, cable pulling, termination and connection of wiring during construction. These works occur before systems are energized.

items.title: Technical and institutional infrastructure construction
items.description: Execution of civil infrastructure such as sports courts, domed structures, classrooms, guardhouses, sidewalks and institutional buildings according to architectural plans provided by the client.

Faq.title: Clear answers for Google and for your clients
Faq.subtitle: This block is designed for conversational queries such as the ones users ask Google or voice assistants on mobile devices.

items.title: What does Construccion y Mantenimientos FITA do?
items.description: FITA executes fabrication, installation, structural maintenance, and industrial or institutional construction projects according to the engineering and technical specifications provided by the client.

items.title: Where is FITA located?
items.description: Construccion y Mantenimientos FITA S.A. de C.V. is located in Ciudad Madero, Tamaulipas, Mexico, at Paseo de los Mexicas 126-D, Colonia 16 de Septiembre, postal code 89512.

items.title: How can I contact FITA?
items.description: You can contact FITA by phone or WhatsApp at +52 833 518 1171, or by email at cmfitasadecv@gmail.com to request a technical proposal.

items.title: Does FITA design project engineering?
items.description: No. FITA specializes in technical execution. Engineering and architectural design are provided by the client or by the client's engineering firm, and FITA executes according to those documents.

items.title: What types of projects does FITA execute?
items.description: FITA executes structural fabrication, structural installation, protective coating systems, structural maintenance and reinforcement, electrical infrastructure work during construction, and institutional civil works.
